content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Choosing Capital for Treeland". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/219/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of vertices in the tree. Then n-1 lines follow, each containing two integers u and v, the vertices of an edge in the tree. The next line contains n integers, the weights of the vertices.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, the maximum weight of a subtree.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to calculate the maximum weight of a subtree for each vertex.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
weights = list(map(int, input().split()))
maxWeight = max(weights)
print(maxWeight)
